SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2011 - DEPT. 506, JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT PRESENT WITH HELEN SUN AS MANDARIN INTERPRETER, MATTER WAS HEARD AND THE COURT TAKEN THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2011. NO EXHIBIT RETAIN BY THE COURT.
